TextView.android:text:
Welcome to HandSpeak.

By creating an account, you agree to the following:

1. Camera Usage
HandSpeak uses your device camera solely to detect hand gestures for sign language recognition. Camera data is processed on-device and is never uploaded or stored.

2. Microphone Usage
The microphone is used for speech-to-sign conversion. Audio is processed locally and not retained.

3. Data Collection
We collect only your email address for authentication purposes via Firebase. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.

4. User Responsibility
You are responsible for ensuring HandSpeak is used in appropriate contexts. The app is provided as-is and accuracy of sign recognition may vary.

5. Changes
We may update these terms. Continued use of the app implies acceptance of any updates.
